mapping.a_element: SHAP additive decomposition attributing the model output to each feature's contribution
mapping.b_element: ordered first-rejection decomposition attributing total power to each sequential stage

brief_justification: Paper A is a supervised gradient-boosting (XGBoost) sentiment classifier with Shapley-value feature attribution, whereas Paper B is a sequential goodness-of-fit testing procedure that conditionally calibrates nested acceptance regions to obtain a multiplicative Type-I-error decomposition; the only faint overlap is that each 'decomposes a total into contributions', but the machinery differs entirely (cooperative-game Shapley allocation over features vs. chain-rule conditional-probability calibration of hypothesis-test error), so no role-for-role mapping of the governing process holds.
